guion_padre.introduccion: Welcome to Lesson 45. Today we will explore some wonderful sounds.
guion_padre.instruccion_c: Point to the big C and say: cccccc. Keep the sound going!
guion_padre.instruccion_k: Now point to the big K and say: kkkkkk.

parent_story: The cat ate a sweet cake. A kangaroo jumped over the cake box.
